_format: The bundled reminder catalogue. Each entry is copied into config/hex/reminders.json when the player adds
it, so `reminder` is exactly the shape that file uses and can be pasted straight into it.
presetId  stable identity, never reused for a different preset. Names two lang keys:
revision  bump whenever the definition below changes. An installed copy the player has NOT edited is
updated in place on the next launch; an edited one is left alone and offered the update.
category  grouping in the browser. Names hex.reminders.presets.category.<category>
trigger.kind   TIMER | CHAT_MATCH | ISLAND_ENTER | ISLAND_LEAVE | WORLD_JOIN | HELD_ITEM
trigger.value  regex (CHAT_MATCH) / island name (ISLAND_*) / Skyblock item id (HELD_ITEM)
trigger.seconds  delay between arming and firing; 0 fires immediately
trigger.literal  CHAT_MATCH only: plain substring instead of a regex
text           supports $0-$9 for a CHAT_MATCH pattern's capture groups, and $$ for a literal $
conditions[]   kind: ON_SKYBLOCK | ON_ISLAND | NOT_ON_ISLAND | HOLDING_ITEM, plus a value
actions[]      kind: HUD | SOUND. A SOUND carries value (sound id), pitch and volume.
IMPORTANT: every CHAT_MATCH pattern must be confirmed against live Hypixel before being added here.
A preset that silently never fires is worse than no preset, because a player cannot tell it apart from
a broken feature. The catalogue is deliberately small for that reason.

reminder.name: Hourly check-in
reminder.text: Check pets, forge and bazaar orders
